key_points: Political parties are essential for democratic governance
They organize public opinion and contest elections
They help form government and make policies
Opposition parties ensure accountability of the government
Different political parties represent different social interests
examples: United States follows a two-party system
Regional parties like TDP and BJD influence national politics
formulas: Multiparty System = Multiple parties competing in elections
Coalition Government = Several parties joining together to form government
Political Influence = Public Support + Electoral Success
exam_tips: Compare one-party, two-party and multiparty systems
Understand the role of opposition parties
Focus on the functions of political parties in elections
Remember how political parties influence policy making
